one_liner: Harvest offers a full REST API (v2) for time tracking and project management, supporting Personal Access Tokens for self-serve scripting and OAuth2 for public integrations, with API access included on all plans.

auth_methods.notes: Personal Access Token generated in the Developers section of Harvest ID; used as Bearer token plus required Harvest-Account-Id header.
Full OAuth2 flow (Authorization Code for server-side, Implicit Grant for client-side) required for public/multi-user integrations; requires registering an OAuth2 application.

self_serve_notes: API access is included in all Harvest plans including free trial/plan accounts; developers can generate a Personal Access Token immediately from id.getharvest.com/developers without needing approval. Full OAuth2 app registration is also self-serve via the same Developers portal.

api_surface.notes: REST API v2 covering time entries, projects, tasks, users, invoices, expenses, reports, clients, etc. Supports GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE with JSON. Rate limited to ~100 requests/15s.

evidence.supports: Describes Personal Access Token and OAuth2 authentication methods, header requirements (Authorization Bearer, Harvest-Account-Id, User-Agent).
Confirms REST API design, supported HTTP methods, JSON responses, and rate limiting via 429 status codes.
General API v2 documentation hub confirming REST surface across multiple resources.

flags: Third-party MCP servers exist but are not officially maintained by Harvest.
Free plan API access claim is based on help center overview but should be reverified against current pricing page for edge cases (e.g., trial limits).
